archetype.name: Soul Warden
archetype.note: This archetype offers Advanced Domain at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Advanced Domain
feat.special: You can select this feat multiple times. Each time, you must select a different advanced domain spell.
feat.text: Your prayers have unlocked deeper secrets of your deity’s domain. You gain an advanced domain spell from one of your domains for which you have an initial domain spell.

traits.name: Cleric
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the cleric class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
